rationale: To start deleting duplicates, first select one of the duplicate rows that is not associated with a task (row with "Ten experience whole note..." and Source ID "User: Ana Christensen").
Select the second duplicate (also "Ten experience whole note..." with Source ID "User: Ana Christensen") so both non-task duplicates are chosen for deletion.

action_text: Choose "Delete" from the "Actions on selected rows" dropdown
rationale: After selecting the duplicate rows, use the bulk action to remove them from the list.
Verify a candidate for deletion truly lacks a task association by inspecting its details before deleting.
Confirm that the record to keep (same short description) is the one associated with a task (Change Request) so it isn’t deleted.
